title: Ord Thoden

'''Ord Thoden''' was a tectonically active [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dynali sector/Legends|Dynali sector]].<ref name="Message to Spacers">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/Mesop1|text=Message to Spacers 1: XQ2 Space Platform}}</ref> Its capital was [[Domitree]], and it was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Boganni Hrul]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|jediwatch/1337_1.html|Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi}}</ref> It was the headquarters of [[Bengel Shipbuilders]], and relied on the company's [[XQ1 Platform|XQ1 Space Platforms]] as stopover points for travelers to alleviate space transport traffic. The [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]] also had dealings on the planet.<ref name="Message to Spacers" /> It was the site of a deadly groundquake [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], and was the homeworld of [[Aris-Del Wari]] and her mother, [[Jonava Billane]].<ref name="Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi" />
